revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Yashiro_Ōtoshi_Shrine]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

'''八代大歳神社''' 八代大歳神社は[[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]八代宮前町にある[[大歳神社]]。神社内に岩神大明神を[[年神]]とともに祀る。
=概要= [[姫路城]]の北にある八代山の麓に鎮座。 [[大歳神]](おおとしのかみ)[[素盞鳴尊]](すさそうのみこと)、[[大山昨神]](おおやまくいのかみ)、別名[[山末之主神]](やますえのぬしかみ)が祀る。
=外部リンク= [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html 八代大歳神社公式サイト]
=アクセス= [[姫路駅]]からなら北へ徒歩4分。 {{Stub}}

=外部リンク= [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html 八代大歳神社公式サイト]
=アクセス= [[姫路駅]]からなら北へ徒歩4分。 {{Stub}}

revision.comment: Nnh がページ「[[八代大歳神社（姫路市八代宮前町）]]」を「[[八代大歳神社]]」に、リダイレクトを残さずに移動しました: 曖昧さ回避の書式誤り。この名前の神社はほかにないので曖昧さ回避は不要

revision.text:
[[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[Category:pages with redlinks to fill]] [[ja:八代大歳神社]][[category:&action=edit]] {{Shrine |Name = Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine |Image = {{Image requested|cat=Himeji City}} |Location = {{ill|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|姫路市}}, Yashiro Miyamae-chō 19-27 |Coordinates = {{coord|34|51|4.1|N|134|41|30.6|E|region:JP-28_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神}}, {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素盞鳴尊}}, {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山咋神}} }} '''Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine''' (八代大歳神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|姫路市}}, Japan. The shrine also enshrines Iwakami Daimyōjin along with the {{ill|Toshigami|ja|年神}}.
== Overview == The shrine is situated at the base of Yashiroyama, north of {{ill|Himeji Castle|ja|姫路城}}. It venerates {{ill|Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神}}, {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素盞鳴尊}}, and {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山咋神}}.
== Access == The shrine is a 4-minute walk north of {{ill|Himeji Station|ja|姫路駅}}.
== Notes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html Official website of Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine]
{{Shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 八代大歳神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=姫路市}} |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]八代宮前町19-27 |位置 = |地図 = |祭神 = [[大歳神]]、[[素盞鳴尊]]、[[大山咋神]] |社格 = |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |緯度度=34|緯度分=51|緯度秒=4.1|経度度=134|経度分=41|経度秒=30.6}} '''八代大歳神社'''（やしろおおとしじんじゃ）は[[兵庫県]][[姫路市]]八代宮前町にある[[大歳神社]]<ref>http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html</ref>。神社内に岩神大明神を[[年神]]とともに祀る。
==概要== [[姫路城]]の北にある八代山の麓に鎮座。[[大歳神]]、[[素盞鳴尊]]、[[大山咋神]]を祀る。
==アクセス== [[姫路駅]]から北へ徒歩4分。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
==外部リンク== * [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html 八代大歳神社公式サイト] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やしろおおとししんしや}} [[Category:姫路市の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[八代大歳神社]] to [[Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
|name = Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
|image = {{image requested|cat=Himeji City}}
|location = [[:en:Himeji|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture]], Yashiro Miyamae-chō 19-27
|coordinates = {{Coord|34.851091|N|134.691694|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|deity = {{ill|Susanoo|qid=Q272993}}; {{ill|Toshigami|qid=Q3028663}}; {{ill|Ōyamakui|qid=Q10935105}}
|location = {{ill|Himeji|qid=Q209801}}
}}
'''Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine''' (八代大歳神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Himeji|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture]], Japan. The shrine also enshrines Iwakami Daimyōjin along with the [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]].

== Overview ==
The shrine is situated at the base of Yashiroyama, north of [[:en:Himeji Castle|Himeji Castle]]. It venerates {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Toshigami|lt=Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素盞鳴尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, and [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamatsumi]].

== Access ==
The shrine is a 4-minute walk north of [[:en:Himeji Station|Himeji Station]].

== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}

== External Links ==
* [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html Official website of Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine]

'''Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine''' (八代大歳神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Himeji|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture]], Japan. The shrine also enshrines Iwakami Daimyōjin along with the [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]].

== Overview ==
The shrine is situated at the base of Yashiroyama, north of [[:en:Himeji Castle|Himeji Castle]]. It venerates {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Toshigami|lt=Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素盞鳴尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, and [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamatsumi]].

== Access ==
The shrine is a 4-minute walk north of [[:en:Himeji Station|Himeji Station]].

== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}

'''Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine''' (八代大歳神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Himeji|Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture]], Japan. The shrine also enshrines Iwakami Daimyōjin along with the [[:en:Toshigami|Toshigami]].

== Overview ==
The shrine is situated at the base of Yashiroyama, north of [[:en:Himeji Castle|Himeji Castle]]. It venerates {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Toshigami|lt=Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素盞鳴尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, and [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamatsumi]].

== Access ==
The shrine is a 4-minute walk north of [[:en:Himeji Station|Himeji Station]].

== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}

== External Links ==
* [http://www.yojnja.sakura.ne.jp/index.html Official website of Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine]

'''Yashiro Ōtoshi Shrine''' (八代大歳神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Himeji|en|Himeji|WD=Q209801|lt=Himeji City, Hyōgo Prefecture}}, Japan. The shrine also enshrines Iwakami Daimyōjin along with the {{ill|Toshigami|en|Toshigami|WD=Q3028663|lt=Toshigami}}.

== Overview ==
The shrine is situated at the base of Yashiroyama, north of {{ill|Himeji Castle|en|Himeji Castle|WD=Q188754|lt=Himeji Castle}}. It venerates {{ill|Toshigami|lt=Toshigami|lt=Ōtoshi no Kami|ja|大歳神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoshi no Kami|qq=}}, {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素盞鳴尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, and {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamatsumi}}.

== Access ==
